title: Service
description: A running service registered in the Jengo world layer.

id.description: Unique identifier for this service. Kebab-case. Stable — other entries reference this.

description.description: What this service provides, what consumes it, and why it exists.

status.description: Current operational status of the service.

url.description: Primary URL where this service is reachable.

health_check_url.description: URL for the health check endpoint. Optional.

tech_stack.description: Technologies and frameworks this service is built with.

owner.description: ID of the person responsible for this service.

dependencies.description: IDs of other services this service depends on at runtime. Optional.

deployment.description: How and where this service is deployed.

host.description: The host, server, or cluster where the service runs.

port.description: Port the service listens on internally. Optional.

monitoring_url.description: URL for monitoring dashboard, logs, or metrics. Optional.

last_deployed.description: When this service was last deployed. ISO 8601 datetime. Optional.
